300.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Rafi' (may Allah be pleased with him) that a roasted sheep was prepared for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He said to me: 'O Abu Rafi', give me the foreleg.' So I gave it to him. He said again: 'Give me the foreleg.' I said: 'O Messenger of Allah, a sheep has only two forelegs, and you have had them both.' He said: 'Had you remained silent, you would have given me a foreleg each time I asked.'
300.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Rafi' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Seekor domba panggang disiapkan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau berkata kepadaku: 'Wahai Abu Rafi', berikan kepadaku lengan depannya.' Lalu aku memberikannya. Beliau berkata lagi: 'Berikan kepadaku lengan depannya.' Aku berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, seekor domba hanya memiliki dua lengan depan, dan Anda sudah mendapatkan keduanya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Seandainya kamu diam, tentu kamu akan terus memberiku lengan depan setiap kali aku memintanya.'

330.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered the Ka'bah along with Uthman ibn Talhah, Usamah ibn Zayd and Bilal, and locked it. When he came out, I asked Bilal: 'What did the Prophet ﷺ do inside?' He said: 'He left two pillars on his right, one on his left, and three behind him, then prayed. The Ka'bah at that time had six pillars.'

Ketika beliau keluar, aku bertanya kepada Bilal: 'Apa yang dilakukan Nabi ﷺ di dalamnya?' Ia berkata: 'Beliau meninggalkan dua tiang di sebelah kanannya, satu di sebelah kirinya, dan tiga tiang di belakangnya, lalu shalat. Ka'bah ketika itu memiliki enam tiang.'

360.iwh_en: It was narrated from Suhayb (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the people of Paradise enter Paradise, they will be called: O people of Paradise, you have a promise with Allah that He wishes to fulfill. They will say: What is it? Has He not made our faces radiant, saved us from the Fire, and admitted us to Paradise? Then the veil will be lifted and they will gaze upon Him — and by Allah, He will not give them anything more beloved to them than gazing upon Him.'
360.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Suhayb (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila penghuni surga masuk ke dalam surga, mereka akan dipanggil: Wahai penghuni surga, kalian memiliki janji di sisi Allah yang ingin Dia penuhi. Mereka berkata: Apakah itu? Bukankah Dia telah mencerahkan wajah kami, menyelamatkan kami dari neraka, dan memasukkan kami ke surga? Kemudian tabir disingkap dan mereka memandang kepada-Nya — demi Allah, Dia tidak akan memberi mereka sesuatu yang lebih mereka cintai daripada memandang kepada-Nya.'

365.iwh_en: It was narrated from Suhayb (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was sitting with his companions when he smiled and said: 'Will you not ask me why I smiled?' They said: 'Why did you smile, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'I am amazed at the affair of the believer — all of his affairs are good for him, and that applies only to the believer. If something good befalls him, he is thankful and that is good for him. And if something harmful befalls him, he is patient and that is good for him.'
365.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Suhayb (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sedang duduk bersama para sahabatnya ketika beliau tersenyum dan bersabda: 'Tidakkah kalian bertanya kepadaku mengapa aku tersenyum?' Mereka berkata: 'Mengapa engkau tersenyum, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku kagum dengan urusan seorang mukmin — semua urusannya baik baginya, dan itu hanya berlaku bagi mukmin. Jika kebaikan menimpanya, ia bersyukur dan itu baik baginya. Dan jika sesuatu yang merugikan menimpanya, ia bersabar dan itu baik baginya.'

400.iwh_en: It was narrated from Fadalah ibn Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'On the Day of Judgment, there will be people whose deeds are as large as the mountain of Uhud, but their prayer will have consumed them.' They said: 'How, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'They used to neglect the prayer.'
400.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fadalah ibn Ubayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Pada Hari Kiamat, akan ada orang-orang yang amal-amal mereka sebesar gunung Uhud, namun shalat mereka telah melahapnya.' Mereka bertanya: 'Bagaimana itu, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka biasa meremehkan shalat.'

Fadalah said: 'What reached you?' and narrated the hadith to him.
405.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Fadalah ibn Ubayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Seorang laki-laki melakukan perjalanan kepada Fadalah ibn Ubayd di Mesir dan berkata: 'Aku tidak datang untuk berkunjung — aku datang untuk suatu hadits yang sampai kepadaku dari Rasulullah ﷺ.' Fadalah berkata: 'Apa yang sampai kepadamu?' dan menceritakan hadits itu kepadanya.

410.iwh_en: It was narrated from Awf ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Those who deal with retribution are of three types: a just ruler who applies it in truth, an unjust ruler, and one who acts according to his own desire.'
410.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mereka yang menangani pembalasan ada tiga jenis: pemimpin yang adil yang menerapkannya dengan benar, pemimpin yang zalim, dan seseorang yang bertindak sesuai keinginannya sendiri.'

He called me in and said: "O Awf, count six signs before the Last Hour: my death; then the conquest of Jerusalem; then a plague that will seize you as the plague of sheep; then wealth will increase; then a fitnah that will enter every Arab household; then a truce between you and the Romans..."'
415.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Awf ibn Malik berkata: 'Aku mendatangi Rasulullah ﷺ di Tabuk sebelum fajar sementara beliau berada di tendanya. Beliau mengizinkanku masuk dan bersabda: "Wahai Awf, hitunglah enam tanda sebelum Hari Kiamat: kematianku; kemudian penaklukan Yerusalem; kemudian wabah yang akan menimpa kalian seperti wabah domba; kemudian harta akan melimpah; kemudian fitnah yang akan memasuki setiap rumah tangga Arab; kemudian perdamaian antara kalian dan orang-orang Romawi..."'

420.iwh_en: It was narrated from Awf ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ went out one day and I was with him until we entered the synagogue of the Jews in Madinah on their feast day. They disliked our entering. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to them: 'O People of the Book, show me twelve men who will testify there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, and Allah will avert His wrath from twelve thousand Jews.' They fell silent and none answered.
420.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ pergi suatu hari dan aku bersamanya hingga kami masuk ke sinagog orang-orang Yahudi di Madinah pada hari raya mereka. Mereka tidak menyukai kedatangan kami. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada mereka: 'Wahai Ahli Kitab, tunjukkan kepadaku dua belas orang yang bersaksi bahwa tidak ada tuhan selain Allah dan bahwa Muhammad adalah utusan Allah, maka Allah akan menghindarkan murka-Nya dari dua belas ribu orang Yahudi.' Mereka diam dan tidak seorang pun menjawab.

435.iwh_en: It was narrated from Awf ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The best of your leaders are those whom you love and who love you, those whom you pray for and who pray for you. The worst of your leaders are those whom you hate and who hate you, those whom you curse and who curse you.'
435.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebaik-baik pemimpin kalian adalah mereka yang kalian cintai dan yang mencintai kalian, yang kalian doakan dan yang mendoakan kalian. Seburuk-buruk pemimpin kalian adalah mereka yang kalian benci dan yang membenci kalian, yang kalian laknat dan yang melaknat kalian.'

436.iwh_en: It was narrated from Awf ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave guidance and instruction.
436.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan bimbingan dan petunjuk.

437.iwh_en: It was narrated from Awf ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Those who deal with retribution are of three types: a just ruler who applies it in truth, an unjust ruler, and one who acts according to his own desire.'
437.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mereka yang menangani pembalasan ada tiga jenis: pemimpin yang adil yang menerapkannya dengan benar, pemimpin yang zalim, dan seseorang yang bertindak sesuai keinginannya sendiri.'

438.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muadh ibn Jabal (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave guidance and instruction.

440.iwh_en: It was narrated from Awf ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that Awf ibn Malik entered the mosque of Hims and saw the people gathered around a man. He asked: 'What is this gathering?' They said: 'Ka'b is storytelling.' He said: 'Woe to him! Did he not hear the Prophet ﷺ say: "Whoever tells stories (for entertainment) in the mosque, Allah will not accept his prayer that day"?'
440.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Awf ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Awf ibn Malik masuk ke masjid Hims dan melihat orang-orang berkumpul di sekeliling seorang laki-laki. Ia bertanya: 'Apa perkumpulan ini?' Mereka berkata: 'Ka'b sedang bercerita.' Ia berkata: 'Celakalah dia! Apakah ia tidak mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa bercerita (untuk hiburan) di masjid, Allah tidak akan menerima shalatnya pada hari itu"?'

445.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the fast of Ashura was a day that Quraysh used to fast in the Pre-Islamic period. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fast it. When he came to Madinah, he fasted it and commanded others to fast it. When Ramadan was made obligatory, Ashura was abandoned — whoever wished fasted it and whoever wished did not.
445.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa puasa Asyura adalah hari yang biasa dipuasakan Quraisy pada masa jahiliyah. Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berpuasa pada hari itu. Ketika beliau tiba di Madinah, beliau berpuasa dan memerintahkan orang-orang untuk berpuasa. Ketika puasa Ramadan diwajibkan, Asyura ditinggalkan — barangsiapa mau berpuasa maka berpuasa, dan barangsiapa tidak mau maka tidak perlu.

455.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the female riders would pass by us while we were in ihram with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. 455.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Para pengendara perempuan melewati kami sementara kami dalam keadaan ihram bersama Rasulullah ﷺ. Ketika mereka sejajar dengan kami, salah seorang dari kami menurunkan jilbabnya dari kepalanya ke wajahnya. Ketika mereka berlalu, kami membuka wajah kami.

500.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to send the sacrificial animals from Madinah to Makkah, and I would twist the garlands for them with my own hands. He would then return home in the state of a man who has not entered ihram, before the animals were slaughtered.
500.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengirim hewan-hewan kurban dari Madinah ke Makkah, dan aku memintal kalung-kalung untuk hewan tersebut dengan tanganku sendiri. Beliau kemudian kembali ke rumah dalam keadaan seperti laki-laki yang belum berihram, sebelum hewan-hewan itu disembelih.

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Sahlah bint Suhayl came and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I see on the face of Abu Hudhayfah something (of displeasure) at Salim entering upon me.' He said: 'Nurse him.' She said: 'How can I nurse him when he is a grown man?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ smiled and said: 'I know he is a grown man.'
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Sahlah binti Suhail datang dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku melihat di wajah Abu Hudzaifah sesuatu (ketidaksenangan) atas masuknya Salim kepadaku.' Beliau bersabda: 'Susuilah ia.' Ia berkata: 'Bagaimana aku menyusuinya sedangkan ia sudah dewasa?' Rasulullah ﷺ tersenyum dan bersabda: 'Aku tahu ia sudah dewasa.'
